task_description: Build a complete delivery agency (agencia de domicilios) platform: Orders API with status workflow, integrated server with Socket.IO real-time notifications, admin dashboard with login/orders/drivers/map/stats, and driver app with login/orders queue/status updates/location sharing. All in Spanish, vanilla HTML/CSS/JS frontend with Leaflet maps.

verification.summary: Server starts cleanly. All API endpoints work: login, orders CRUD, assign driver, status workflow (assigned->picked_up->on_the_way->delivered), stats, drivers list. Admin dashboard loads with Spanish title 'Agencia de Domicilios - Panel de Control'. Driver app loads with title 'Repartidor - Agencia de Domicilios'. Full end-to-end flow verified: admin login, create order, assign driver, driver login, driver sees assigned orders, driver updates status.
